inputs.label: Fasting Blood Sugar
inputs.businessContext: Patient's fasting blood glucose level (measured after 8-12 hours of no caloric intake)

inputs.label: Postprandial Blood Sugar
inputs.businessContext: Patient's blood glucose level 2 hours after meal

inputs.label: Random Blood Sugar
inputs.businessContext: Patient's random blood glucose level at any time of day

inputs.label: HbA1c
inputs.businessContext: Glycated hemoglobin percentage, reflecting average blood glucose over past 2-3 months
